_comment: Decor palette for cabinet finishes. Edit/add entries freely. 'name' is what shows in the 'Boja' dropdown and (with 'code') feeds the future order/cut-list export; 'rgb' is only the 3D preview colour. 'default_front' is the decor coloured boards get by default (doors, top); 'default_interior' is the white/carcass decor non-coloured boards get. A board painted with the default_interior decor reads as white/interior.
